plan.weekly_theme: Ship recurring tasks, protect the board deadline

top_3_priorities.item: P-412: Recurring tasks QA pass and smoke test
top_3_priorities.why_this_week: GA release is July 31 — this is the last engineering gate before release. Missing it pushes GA by a week minimum.

top_3_priorities.item: P-415: Board deck draft to CEO
top_3_priorities.why_this_week: Committed deliverable with CEO by Friday. Non-negotiable. Block Thursday afternoon immediately.

top_3_priorities.item: P-421: Onboarding Figma review with design
top_3_priorities.why_this_week: Design is blocked on your feedback. Each day of delay delays engineering start. OKR1 is the biggest lagging KR.

defer_list.reason: Carries over again — only medium urgency, no committed deadline this week. Defer to next sprint planning.

delegate_list.reason: Research synthesis read-through does not require the Head of Product's time — delegate with a brief on key questions to answer.

risks_this_week: QA on recurring tasks may surface blocking bugs — have a contingency conversation with engineering Monday on what constitutes a hard blocker vs. acceptable MVP risk
Board deck and recurring tasks QA are both highest-urgency — avoid scheduling QA and deck writing on the same day
end_of_week_success_criteria: Recurring tasks: QA sign-off completed and engineering given go/no-go decision
Board deck draft delivered to CEO by 5pm Friday
Onboarding Figma review done and feedback documented for design
Bulk actions spec explicitly deferred in Linear with a target date
